statistics.method: cluster-robust standard errors (clusters = contrast-set families), 95% CIs
statistics.reference: Anthropic, Adding Error Bars to Evals (arXiv:2411.00640)

eligible_not_applicable_mode_verdicts.meaning: Eligible check found no current cue or obligation; counts as resolved coverage.

gate_eligible_not_applicable_mode_verdic.meaning: Safety gate check found no current cue or obligation; classified separately for audit but still resolved coverage.

unclear_mode_verdicts.meaning: Literal UNCLEAR verdicts require adjudication or regeneration before strict QA.

gate_unclear_mode_verdicts.meaning: Safety gate UNCLEAR verdicts are always publish blockers.

scorer_parse_errors.meaning: Verifier parse failures from retry attempts; final PASS/FAIL/NOT_APPLICABLE/UNCLEAR verdict remains authoritative.

scorer_raw_outputs_truncated_samples.meaning: Bounded raw-output samples from failed verifier parse attempts were truncated for artifact hygiene; final verdict remains authoritative.
